title: OSF Business SM Profile — next/ (isa95 + constraints facet)
description: Validator for next/profiles/{erp,qms,...}/*.json business entities (IT-domain, polled by it-edge). Mirrors validation/business-profile-schema.json plus the next/ facets: 'constraints' ($ref constraint-schema.json — evaluated centrally by it-evaluator) and a loosely-typed 'isa95' (the MOM model is evolving; deep semantics are reviewed, not schema-pinned — same pattern as constraints-via-lint). Attributes use 'required' (boolean), aligned with machine-profile-schema.json.

_comment.description: Optional doc/meta key (demo/example fixtures). Ignored by consumers.

_example.description: Optional meta flag: marks this as an example/demo fixture, not a canonical profile.

constraints.description: Optional deviation facet — keyed by constraint id, typed by constraint-schema.json. Evaluated centrally by it-evaluator; cross-reference enforced by next/ci/lint-constraints.mjs.

isa95.description: ISA-95/MOM mapping, loosely typed (evolving model; objectModel/momDomain/level/propertyMap/note — semantics reviewed, not pinned).

quality.description: Optional next/-only attribute facet (FR-SDC2). Source quality propagation policy for IT/business attributes — 'onBad' = behaviour when the upstream value is bad/absent (drop|flag|hold); 'nullFlavor' = HL7/ISO null-flavor token. Optional everywhere; absent = legacy forward-as-is.

semantics.description: Optional next/-only facet (FR-SDC3). IRI reference(s) grounding this profile/attribute in an external vocabulary (CESMII SM, ISO/IEC, BFO, …) for KG-Builder node enrichment. Single prefixed IRI string, array of them, or object form ({ $ref, sameAs[] }).
